no: Tweaks and Tricks by Ilya Ivanov (BGforge). General tweaks covering familiars, traps, items, spells, stores, gameplay rules, and convenience features. Several components are non-EE or require specific game configs.

conflicts.source: Both modify familiar behavior/files with qdtnb_ prefix. Other components compatible, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: MiH Item Pack's Improved Tome of Golems and Miscellaneous Item Improvements overlap with Tweaks and Tricks item changes
conflicts.myComps: #24 Hassle-free ammo #25 #26 #27 Thrown weapons #29 Cloak of Mirroring #37 Equalizer

conflicts.reason: Only one real overlap TnT cn:42 (Spider form ignores web) and SubtleD cn:2215 (Web Slow) both modify spwi215.spl, spdr201.spl, spin683.spl. TnT adds web immunity to spider form; SubtleD changes web from Hold to Slow. Both can coexist — SubtleD changes what web does, TnT makes spider immune to it regardless. Install SubtleD before TnT (TnT's immunity applies to whatever web effect exists). Other listed pairs have NO shared spell files . SD cn:40/45/50 (Clones/Invisibility/Haste) TnT cn:51/52/54 (Project Image/Mislead/PnP ProtEvil) Keep both.
conflicts.source: Both modify spwi215/spdr201/spin683; SD changes effect type, TnT adds immunity; complementary if SD installs first, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: TnT cn:67 (True Grandmastery) and cn:68 (Multiclass restrictions) modify WEAPPROF.2DA. RR cn:0 (Dual-wielding) also modifies WEAPPROF row 32 but was RR cn:1 (Kit Revisions) modifies thief CLABs, no overlap with TnT cn:67/68.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Dual-wielding #1 Kit Revisions (RR cn:0 removed from preset; cn:1 safe)

conflicts.reason: Functionality provided by Tweaks and Tricks (per II install notes)
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Epic Locks #100 Epic Traps #200 Epic Trap Setting #400 Epic Detect Illusions

conflicts.reason: TnT cn:42 (Spider form) modifies shapeshift spells also touched by JT cn:81-83 (Shapeshift corrections). TnT cn:67 (Grandmastery) and cn:68 (Multiclass restrictions) are general proficiency tweaks unrelated to JT shapeshift fixes. Check component-by-component if mixing.
conflicts.myComps: #42 Spider form #46 True Sight #51 Project Image #52 Mislead #67 Grandmastery #68 Multiclass restrictions
conflicts.theirComps: #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift corrections #360 Nature's Beauty blindness #370 Imoen script fix

conflicts.reason: Partial replacement. Trap Overhaul rewrites all .ARE trap mechanics. TnT core (cn:14) + detection/range (cn:2/3) become redundant. TnT UX features (cn:4-13: intuition, pause, centering, sound, type disclosure) are unique to TnT but REQUIRE cn:14 to function, and cn:14 conflicts with Trap Overhaul's .ARE rewrites. Neither detects the other. Removed TnT trap UX components (cn:4/6/8/10/11/13) . TnT cn:15 (Davaeorn Battle Horrors) is independent.
conflicts.source: TnT easy_traps/main.tpa creates scripts on .ARE regions; Trap Overhaul rewrites all .ARE structures; no cross-detection, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Mod-level note from install guide. Olvyn spell components cover similar ground to TnT spell tweaks. Does NOT apply to cn:980/990 (ranger/paladin progression, the only Olvyn ). Neither detects the other.
conflicts.myComps: #42 Spider form #46 True Sight #49 Non-Detection #55 Non-hostile Grease
conflicts.theirComps: Spell modification components (not cn:980/990 which are the only Olvyn in Ultimate preset)

conflicts.reason: Tweaks and Tricks proficiency and bard tweaks overlap with cdtweaks
conflicts.myComps: #28 Remove blur #30 Potion stacking #40 #41 Protection items #60 Ankheg armor #67 Grandmastery #68 Multiclass restrictions #75 Romance cheats
conflicts.theirComps: #2160 #2161 #2162 #2163 #2164 Weapon proficiency #2200 #2210 #2211 Grandmastery #2270 #2271 Bard spell progression

conflicts.reason: TnT grandmastery and multiclass restriction changes overlap with M&G's revised mechanics
Similar to bart_tweaks No Reputation Loss from Slayer Form. Choose one
TnT Limited stock removes items from stores that ZSTweaks modifies
Both modify Protection from Evil spell. MiH cn:3 dynamically scans all domination spells; TnT cn:54 is a simpler PnP-style fix. Use one.
Install-order supersession: if TnT #60 is installed first, cdtweaks #3230 auto-skips via !MOD_IS_INSTALLED predicate.

sum: 80 individually selectable tricks and tweaks covering a wide range of gameplay adjustments. Install late to override earlier mod changes.

co.no: Compatible with WTP Familiars

Makes trap detection instant. CONFLICT: Overlaps with Trap Overhaul Fast Detection (cn:111 selected). Both modify trap detection scripts. Trap Overhaul is more comprehensive (includes Monk Evasion + Recovery). Use one or the other.

True Sight removes all illusions including those from items and innate abilities.
Otiluke's Sphere can be targeted on enemies to trap them.
Greater Command affects an area instead of single target.
Non-Detection properly blocks divination spells.
Chaos Shield effects don't stack when cast multiple times.

advisories.reason: NOT a real conflict. TnT cn:15 modifies trap properties; MiH cn:2 modifies golem stats. TnT cn:63/64 (Fair Fights) removes items from named NPCs; MiH targets creature types. No shared files.
